institution.name: Wichita State University-Campus of Applied Sciences and Technology

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 24 pp at Wichita State University-Campus of Applied Sciences and Technology vs the 2003–2007 baseline (36.3% vs 60.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wichita State University-Campus of Applied Sciences and Technology rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.0k → $7.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wichita State University-Campus of Applied Sciences and Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Wichita State University-Campus of Applied Sciences and Technology rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (54.1% → 67.2%).
